docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMELA MORRIS IS PRESENT.
